analysis.trend_summary: Search interest in Sadashivanagar has declined 15% from the 12-month average (51.8 to 44.0), indicating weakening demand. However, the locality remains a recognized Bangalore neighborhood with seasonal patterns and one emerging micro-trend around 'Sadashivanagar club'.
